title: linaria arvensis subsp. simplex
intro: Linaria arvensis subsp. simplex, also known as Butterfly Weed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Toadflax family. Its medicinal properties include being a natural source of flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic compounds, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs for its medicinal and therapeutic effects.
